description: Designed and redesigned 20+ responsive web pages to improve usability and brand identity using Figma.
Created and maintained variables, components, and design systems.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams, including graphic designers, developers, and analysts.
Refreshed brand visual styling, contributing to a more cohesive and modern brand identity.
Conceptualized a gamification system for Cooledtured’s Engage platform.
Designed and built a client-facing website using Figma and Wix.
Designed accessible web and mobile solutions to support non-profit initiatives using Figma and Wix.
Developed prototypes to enable stakeholders to visualize design concepts.
Researched and proposed cost-effective web strategies tailored for non-profits.
